title: [BGE]BetterGameplayExperience
body:
### **简体中文** 介绍：《更好的游戏体验》整合包提供了优化更能，它能让你的游戏变得更流畅，当然，这主要还是归功于《钠》模组。 当然，BGE在经过无数次测试，发现它的可玩性还是不高，于是加入了《更好的末地》模组。当然，这本身就是个优化整合包，所以可玩性肯定没多高。 当然，不用担心，因为模组都是在Modrinth上找的。
注：国内请到[MC百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/)里进行问答（目前仅有留言）
已知模组 - [更好的末地](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/3163.html)
- [更好的延迟显示](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2950.html)
- [C2M引擎](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/3511.html)
- [经验机制改革](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/1499.html)
- [动态光源](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2954.html)
- [伐树](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/3054.html)
- [更多动画](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/4378.html)
- [结构变体](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/4518.htm)
- [钠](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2785.html)
- [钠·扩展](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/3701.html)
- （还有更多模组...）
### **English** Description: The BetterGameplayExperience modpack provides an optimized boost that will make your game smoother, thanks to the Sodium mod, of course. Of course, after countless tests, BGE found that its playability was still not high, so it added the Better End mod. Of course, this is an optimized modpack in itself, so it's certainly not very playable. Of course, don't worry, because the mods are all found on Modrinth.
Included Mods [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
Better Ping Display(Fabric)
Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)
Clumps
Dynamic Lights
Falling Tree
Not Enough Animations
Repurposed Structures
Sodium
Sodium Extra
(There are many more mods...
以下是2.0版本改动|The following changes have been made in version 2.0
2.0改动|2.0 Changes 本次更新对整合包进行了大改。
更新内容(主要) - 游戏版本更新：由1.21降级为1.20
- 新增TaC枪械模组(Fabric版)
- 新增多个优化模组：极致地优化性能
- 新增材质包：美观好看的材质包
- 新增光影：喜欢光影的朋友不要忘记开启光影
- 新增物理模组：更真实
- 新增了更多的玩家动作：怎么只有生物才有更多动作？玩家也要！
- 新增生物防晒霜：伪惊变，其实就是不让你无聊而已
- 美化了BOSS血条：得益于材质包
- 原版生物群系已被修改
- 新增多个数据包
- 新增机械动力以及其多个附属模组：肝帝狂喜！
- 新增更好的下界：让您的下界更进一步
Q＆A 问：为什么整合包直接从1.0变2.0？
答：因为这次是大更新，无论是从游戏版本变更方面还是从整合包大小方面都是一项不小的更新。

问：为什么突然复活这个项目？
答：得益于SAZ的100+下载，使我产生了复活这个整合包的想法(福利了相当于)

问：日后还有什么想法？
答：这个整合包估计会更新得很慢，因为我需要专研出更多有趣且优化性能的玩法

问：这个整合包的特色玩法？
答：发展文明，多种文明都可以发展，甚至可以发展刷怪文明。

问：这个整合包低配置电脑能正常玩吗？
答：能！作者在整合包测试时所使用的设备配置：酷睿i5-4210M + GTX 860M显卡 + 8GB内存(条)|(额。。。应该没有比这个还低配的吧)

问：这个整合包适合联机吗？
答：适合！如果你有很好的朋友，那么这款整合包拿来联机也是不错的，整合包内有许多风景(不妨拉上你的伴侣一起来打个卡？)

问：下次什么时候更新？
答：不确定因素。可能会等到SAZ 1000、10000下载的时候，也可能不定时更新

This update includes a major overhaul of modpacks.
Major Updates - Game Update: Downgraded from 1.21 to 1.20
- Added TaC Gun Mod (Fabric Edition)
- Added multiple optimization modules: Optimize performance to the extreme
- New Material Pack: A beautiful texture pack
- New light and shadow: If you like light and shadow, don't forget to turn on light and shadow
- New Physics Mods: More realistic
- Added more player moves: Why do only creatures have more moves? Players too!
- Mob sunscreen: Pseudo-Apocalypse, in fact, just doesn't let you get bored
- Beautified the boss health bar: thanks to the texture pack
- The vanilla biome has been modified
- Multiple data packets have been added
- New mechanical power and its multiple sub-mods(Create Mod): Hardcore Player Mode!
- New Better Nether: Take your Nether one step further
Q＆A Q: Why did the modpack go from 1.0 to 2.0?
A: Because this is a big update, it's not a small update, both in terms of game version changes and modpack size.

Q: Why the sudden resurrection of this project?
A: Thanks to the 100+ downloads of SAZ, I came up with the idea of resurrecting this modpack (the equivalent of a benefit)

Q: What other ideas do you have in the future?
A: I expect this modpack to update slowly, as I need to focus on more interesting and performance-optimized gameplay

Q: What are the features of this modpack?
Answer: To develop civilization, a variety of civilizations can be developed, and even monster farming civilizations can be developed.

Q: Will this modpack be played on a low-spec PC normally?
A: Yes! The device configuration used by the author in the modpack test: Core i5-4210M + GTX 860M graphics card + 8GB RAM (bar)|(Uh...) There shouldn't be anything lower than this, right?)

Q: Is this modpack online?
A: Yes! If you have good friends, this modpack is also great for online, and there are a lot of scenery in the modpack (Why not bring your partner along for the check-in?). ）

Q: When will I update next?
Answer: Uncertainties. may wait until SAZ 1000 or 10000 downloaded, or they may be updated from time to time
